step1.title: Your business
step1.socialBanner: Are you a cooperative, non-profit, or community organization? We build the same quality sites for free.
step1.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your business in 2–3 sentences. What do you do? Who are your customers?
step1.languagesTooltip: Select all languages your site should support. If more than one, pick the primary language — we'll build that first.
step1.domain: Do you have a domain name?
step1.domainNoHint: No worries — we'll sort it out after payment.
step1.paymentTooltip: This means customers can pay you directly through your website (e.g. Stripe). Not sure? Pick "Not sure" and we'll figure it out.
step1.login: Do visitors need to log in?
step1.loginTooltip: A login lets your visitors create accounts and access private content. If you're not sure, pick "Not sure" — we'll advise you.

step2.title: Contact info
step2.hoursAppointmentHint: Visitors will see "By appointment" on your site. You can add a booking link later.
step2.hours247Hint: Your site will show that you're open 24/7.
step2.socialsHint: Select the platforms you use and add your URL or handle.

step3.title: Look & feel
step3.logoUploadHint: PNG or SVG preferred. Max 5 MB.
step3.faviconTooltip: A favicon is the small icon that appears in the browser tab next to your site name. If you don't have one, we'll create it from your logo or brand.
step3.brandColorsHint: Pick your main colors or leave it to us.
step3.inspirationExplainer: This really helps. Showing us a site you like is worth more than any description. It tells us exactly what style, layout, and feel you're going for — so we can deliver something closer to what you have in mind, faster.
step3.inspirationLikes: What do you like about it?
step3.inspirationOtherPlaceholder: Anything else you like about this site?

step4.title: Your site
step4.choiceAutoDesc: Upload your content and we'll design the best layout for you.
step4.choiceManualDesc: Pick which pages you want, then fill in the details for each one.
step4.autoFilesHint: Logos, photos, text documents — anything that should go on your site.
step4.autoFileWhatPlaceholder: e.g. Our team photo, Menu PDF, etc.
step4.autoNotesPlaceholder: Any extra info, preferences, or instructions for us.
step4.pagesHint: Select the pages you want on your site, then fill in the details — or leave them empty and we'll build something for you.
step4.modalIntro: Fill in what you want, or leave it empty — we'll handle the rest.

pageOptions.name: Home
pageOptions.description: Your main landing page — first impression, key message, calls to action.

pageOptions.name: About Us
pageOptions.description: Tell your story — who you are, your mission, your values.

pageOptions.name: Services
pageOptions.description: What you offer — list your services with descriptions and pricing.

pageOptions.name: Team
pageOptions.description: Introduce your team — photos, roles, and short bios.

pageOptions.name: Portfolio / Gallery
pageOptions.description: Showcase your work — photos, case studies, or project highlights.

pageOptions.name: Product Catalog
pageOptions.description: Display your products — images, descriptions, and prices.

pageOptions.name: Menu
pageOptions.description: Your food or drink menu — categories, items, and prices.

pageOptions.name: Pricing
pageOptions.description: Your plans or rates — clear pricing with feature comparison.

pageOptions.name: Testimonials
pageOptions.description: Social proof — reviews and quotes from happy clients.

pageOptions.name: Contact
pageOptions.description: How to reach you — form, map, phone, email, hours.

pageOptions.name: FAQ
pageOptions.description: Frequently asked questions — save time by answering common queries.

step4.sectionWhatPlaceholder: Describe what you want in this section.
step4.sectionFilesHint: Photos, documents, or anything else for this section.
step4.fileWhatPlaceholder: e.g. 'Front of our shop', 'Team photo', 'Our menu PDF'
step4.anythingElsePlaceholder: Any extra notes, preferences, or instructions for this page.

step5.title: Review
step5.summary: Here's a summary of your project. Review everything and edit if needed.
step5.submitted: Your submission has been received. We'll review it and get back to you within 24 hours.
